zh.All Saints Churchyard South Kirkby, Metr: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾
zh.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wentworth於1450年3月9日出生在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾時，他的父親John Wentworth20歲，母親Joan Calverley11447歲。他於1480年與Jane Mirfield在英國英格蘭越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1524年11月19日在英國英格蘭越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wentworth于1450年3月9日出生在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾时，他的父亲John Wentworth20岁，母亲Joan Calverley11447岁。他于1480年与Jane Mirfield在英国英格兰越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1524年11月19日在英国英格兰越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wentworth was born on 9 March 1450, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Wentworth, was 20 and his mother, Joan Calverley, was 11447. He married Jane Mirfield in 1480, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 November 1524, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wentworth est né le 9 mars 1450, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Wentworth, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Calverley, avait 11447 ans. Il a épousé Jane Mirfield en 1480, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1524, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサル
イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wentworthが1450年3月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルで生まれた時，父John Wentworthは20歳，母Joan Calverleyは11447歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでJane Mirfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1524年11月19日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wentworth(이)가 1450년 3월 9일 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wentworth(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Calverley(은)는 11447세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Jane Mirfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 11월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wentworth nasceu em 9 de março de 1450, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wentworth, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Calverley, tinha 11447 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Mirfield em 1480, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1524, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wentworth родился 9 марта 1450 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wentworth было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Calverley, 11447. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Mirfield в 1480 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 ноября 1524 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
